body: ## New * https://github.com/Bush2021/chrome_plus/commit/a0379693e174b6dc78bebc4ac85d6f25e2efd975 feat: add a switch for showing password without verification * https://github.com/Bush2021/chrome_plus/commit/7008f30327242d7f091a6f4c83b3535c6f2c602c feat: add a switch for forcibly enabling win32k * https://github.com/Bush2021/chrome_plus/commit/e30cee8ee78f66bf7016039df6f9901066cf62c6 feat!: update INI section names and keys for consistency ## Fix * https://github.com/Bush2021/chrome_plus/commit/9492f007af301aba8f7f1f6a9dfce609f2842035 fix: update GetTopContainerView to use GetFocus() * https://github.com/Bush2021/chrome_plus/commit/3cf8f816167b0608049550ed16fdf6abb469546d fix: return the original function when lpVolumeSerialNumber is nullptr (#101) ## Maintenance * https://github.com/Bush2021/chrome_plus/commit/fd6271767064e9a6ceeb2e387a4b59a82ddec9dd docs: add explanation of conditions under which new_tab_disable_name takes effect in INI examples * https://github.com/Bush2021/chrome_plus/commit/0d7967cdde705288f9973e5a8364eef2b3bd2c44 chore: remove unnecessary debug logs in green.h and pakpatch.h * https://github.com/Bush2021/chrome_plus/commit/0d7967cdde705288f9973e5a8364eef2b3bd2c44 chore: remove unused hard patch * https://github.com/Bush2021/chrome_plus/commit/f2eafb2eed7f675b0cc1c258c211d29d6d1180ee chore: removes logic that detects the existence of INI files * https://github.com/Bush2021/chrome_plus/commit/e0c94df2a26ff977256a17b646505947023e256e chore: move utility functions to utils.h * https://github.com/Bush2021/chrome_plus/commit/2e2c019204c0da58e26c69cce90b31d4e5e98213 chore: improve boss key logic to avoid hiding other windows with similar class names (#104) ## Notice * Regarding the print preview failure, this issue is not caused by Chrome++. Users can add the command line parameter `--disable-features=PrintCompositorLPAC` as a temporary solution. For more details, see: #85 * This release introduces ARM64 support and has been tested on an virtual machine. But please note that this is still an experimental effort, so please use with caution. Issues related to this may be reported in #88. Help from anyone with ARM64 development experience would be appreciated. * Some INI key values have been added or modified, and the old key values will be deprecated soon. It is recommended to use a text comparison tool to compare the changes and migrate to the new key values as soon as possible. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Bush2021/chrome_plus/compare/1.9.0...1.10.0
